Transcrição Completa: 12 - How To Leverage Visual Assets To Present Your Services
[00:00] [Music] Visual aids can be things that I've printed off at Kinko's, hung them up on my wall as an example. In addition to that, I hand them out to all my staff so my staff understands what's going on when in the cycles of action that we're participating in as an agency.
[00:15] And in addition to that, I give them to the clients and potential clients. That way, everybody understands and really gets the picture for what's going on.
[00:23] There's a few key pieces of documentation that you can use that break down my processes for the common services that we would sell as agency owners.
[00:31] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: Pyramid Pricing Structure
NÚMEROS: Múltiplos níveis de pacotes com preços escalonados
VISUAL: Pirâmide hierárquica mostrando diferentes níveis de serviço, com base mais larga na parte inferior representando maior volume de clientes e topo mais estreito representando clientes elite. Estrutura visual demonstrando escassez de espaço no topo versus abundância na base.
[00:31] As an example, I also demonstrate my pricing at given times in my agency using pyramids just like this. As an example, I show using the logic of a pyramid that there's less real estate at the top and that there's more real estate at the bottom and that every business is built on the foundation of attention.
[00:49] I then show that there's more people because there's more real estate and it's easier for us to service for the Facebook conversion package and what those costs and just general services or results that people can expect with that particular service.
[01:04] I then up the pricing a little bit in our social services package and then again for our full service agency package and then again for the people that we called our elite customers.
[01:15] So such a key way for my staff to easily understand what we're doing, who we're servicing and when. And it's also something I hung up on the walls of my agency for my physical locations. It worked really well.
[01:26] In addition to that, when you hear me talk about processes and systems that you can demonstrate with these different visual aids, let me give you a key example here.
[01:34] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Phases of Growth and Result"
NÚMEROS: 4 etapas de processo
VISUAL: Processo de 4 etapas demonstrado visualmente, mostrando fluxo sequencial de ações da agência para gerar resultados para clientes. Layout em etapas progressivas com indicadores de fase.
[01:34] As an example of steps to results, our processes broke down. This one is specifically called phases of growth and result. It's a four-step process that we visually demonstrate and we explain the steps that we are taking as an agency to get results for people and how we operate after we've gotten those results.
[01:53] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Steps to Results - Social Services Package"
NÚMEROS: Processo diferenciado para pacote específico
VISUAL: Diagrama de processo com círculos vermelhos e verdes indicando staff interno versus externo. Layout mostrando divisão clara de responsabilidades entre equipe interna e externa, com código de cores para fácil identificação.
[01:53] In addition, this one's called steps to results, but it's for my social services package. So, it's a different offer. This would be for advertising and this would be for general services for posting on social accounts.
[02:04] I also represent with a little key here with red and green circles internal versus external staff and who's handling what.
[02:11] So, long story short, these things help with sending them to clients. These would also be printed off and put on walls so my internal staff could understand what was going on. And this is also great when different people ask you, hey, what is it that you actually do to get the result? These can be printed off and added into the different pitch decks that you have.
[02:29] There's all kinds of cool stuff in here in addition to just things like processes and my pricing.
[02:34] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Project Flow"
NÚMEROS: Fluxo completo de projeto desde fechamento até renovação
VISUAL: Fluxograma detalhado mostrando etapas sequenciais do processo de vendas e execução. Inclui pontos de decisão, responsáveis por cada etapa, e fluxo temporal das atividades. Layout de processo com setas indicando progressão.
[02:34] I would also showcase things like the project flow. So this would be handed to my sales staff and this would also be handed to my internal staff and it would be handed to clients to show what the exact steps were before a deal while a deal is being executed and what happens right after.
[02:50] So as an example, the close is ready. We then have a DocuSign template ready for the agreement typed up by the salesperson. We then send that to the sales and marketing team to fill that out. We then send to me for final approval before sending to the client. We then send to the client.
[03:08] Cindy was my assistant at the time. Shout out to Cindy if she's watching this. Thank you for all your help. She then schedules the strategy session after the client has signed the DocuSign agreement.
[03:19] The strategy session would then begin. We then go through the creative phase and you can see key players here that were a part of my staff at the time for who was doing what listed off.
[03:29] We would then get client approval, move into the social media daily posting, creating engagement campaigns to distribute that content. And this would be the process for our content distribution package that we would sell.
[03:41] We then go into our weekly reporting and we have a review consultation towards the end of the month right before renewal and starting that process over from the creative phase.
[03:51] So point being this is a process that demonstrates visually for my internal staff and for clients what we do when and the exact steps that we would take which is perfect for people who are asking questions about what to do when.
[04:04] So long story short this is critical for you to be able to use. Also you can just simply recreate off the things that I've already done. Just be sure to go in and download all this cool stuff.
[04:14] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: PowerPoint de Apresentação Corporativa
NÚMEROS: $8,000 mensais por consultor ($16,000 total), 4 horas mensais, 120 dias, 23% de aumento de receita
VISUAL: Apresentação profissional em PowerPoint com slides estruturados para pitch corporativo. Layout corporativo com dados de performance e resultados demonstrados visualmente.
[04:14] There's also presentations that I would use in person, which are also examples of visual aids. Literal PowerPoints that have the exact wording that I would use when I would go pitch corporations.
[04:25] One of my deals that I got, there was a $8,000 monthly consulting deal. Technically $16,000 because it was myself and my COO. We were both paid $8,000 each. That took a total of 4 hours each month that we ended up increasing the revenues of that said corporation we were consulting with in under 120 days by 23%.
[04:47] We helped him get bought out by another larger corporation. These are the PowerPoints that I use to close those deals and all the cool stuff that I've already showed you guys that are just visual systems that can help represent what words can't.
[05:01] Download all this cool stuff, give it to some graphic designers, have them rebrand it, change up the copy a little bit, of course, and make it specific to you, your company, your staff, etc., and get some more results. I'll see you in the next video.
📊 RESUMO EXECUTIVO
NÚMEROS PRINCIPAIS:
$8,000 por consultor mensalmente
$16,000 valor total mensal (2 consultores)
4 horas de trabalho mensal por consultor
23% de aumento de receita em menos de 120 dias
4 etapas no processo "Phases of Growth and Result"
Múltiplos níveis de pacotes (Facebook Conversion, Social Services, Full Service, Elite)
ESTRATÉGIAS E SISTEMAS:
Uso de aids visuais impressos (Kinko's) distribuídos para staff, clientes e prospects
Estrutura de precificação em pirâmide baseada em escassez e atenção
Sistema de código de cores (vermelho/verde) para diferenciar staff interno vs externo
Fluxo de projeto documentado desde fechamento até renovação
Processo de 4 fases para crescimento e resultados
"Steps to Results" específico por tipo de pacote
PowerPoints customizados para pitches corporativos
Weekly reporting e review consultations mensais
Processo de aprovação em múltiplas etapas (salesperson → marketing team → aprovação final → cliente)
ESTRUTURA:
Pacotes de Serviço Hierárquicos:
Facebook Conversion Package (base da pirâmide - maior volume)
Social Services Package (nível intermediário)
Full Service Agency Package (nível avançado)
Elite Customers (topo da pirâmide - menor volume, maior valor)
Fluxo de Projeto Completo:
Close Ready
DocuSign Template Preparation
Sales & Marketing Team Review
Final Approval
Client Signature
Strategy Session Scheduling (via assistente Cindy)
Creative Phase
Client Approval
Social Media Daily Posting
Engagement Campaigns
Weekly Reporting
Monthly Review Consultation
Renewal Process
Aplicações dos Visuais:
Paredes do escritório físico
Material de treinamento para equipe
Documentos para clientes e prospects
Pitch decks para apresentações
Material de vendas para equipe comercial
DADOS FINANCEIROS:
Deal de consultoria: $8,000/mês por pessoa
ROI temporal: 4 horas/mês gerando $8,000
Taxa horária efetiva: $2,000/hora
Resultado para cliente: +23% de receita em 120 dias
Outcome final: Aquisição da empresa cliente por corporação maior
DURAÇÃO: ~5:15 minutos FORMATO: Vídeo educacional com demonstração de sistemas visuais e apresentações
